title: arabis corymbiflora var. cenisia
intro: Arabis corymbiflora var. cenisia, also known as Cenis Alps rockcress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white, and four-petaled flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arabis corymbiflora var. cenisia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to treat skin irritations and internally to support respiratory health.
